title: Krieg Unleashes Poison Gas
scene: On pages 5–8, the Baratie conflict focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Don Krieg, Gin, Zeff. Don Krieg prepares poison gas, forcing enemies and allies alike to face the cruelty of his warfare.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: throw away your gas mask, gin.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: You're no longer one of my crew.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don... Krieg...

dialogue.speaker: Krieg Pirates
dialogue.text: ...the Don's really planning on killing even gin!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: What! That's impossible!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Gin's his right-hand man!

dialogue.speaker: Krieg Pirates
dialogue.text: That's right. There's not a single man who's more loyal to the Don than gin.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: even during that time too...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: back when we just escaped grand line only to be suddenly ambushed by fullbody,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Gin alone disguised as our Don,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: and lured the Marines away!

dialogue.speaker: Krieg Pirates
dialogue.text: He's a man who always risked his life fighting for the Don's sake.

dialogue.speaker: Krieg Pirates
dialogue.text: A man who became even a demon to carry out the Don's orders!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: There's just no way Don Krieg could kill a man like gin...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Throw away your mask!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: As if I'd let you fire your poison gas bomb!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Nuisationce!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I won't fall for that trick twice!

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: that hammer brat who can't even swim...

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: I told you I'd kill you within due time, didn't I!?

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: Aghhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's sinking!

summary: This part keeps the Baratie battle centered on willpower, debt, hunger, and pride. The dialogue shows who still stands firm after Krieg’s violence and who is ready to break away from the restaurant’s old life.
